summary: ThreeDScene: χ=2-2g for closed orientable surfaces. ValueTracker g_tr morphs between sphere (g=0, χ=2), torus (g=0.5, χ=0), approximate double torus (g=1, χ=-2) via surface-point interpolation. always_redraw Surface with BLUE-GREEN-ORANGE gradient. Ambient rotation. Legend with genus formula.
